name: JetBrains Central
description: An open system for agentic software development. Control and execution plane for agent-driven software production that connects tools, agents, and infrastructure. Enables coordinated agent workflows across IDEs, CLIs, and pipelines with governance, observability, cost attribution, and semantic context across repositories.
capabilities: orchestrate agent-driven workflows across development environments
support external agents (Claude Agent, Codex, Gemini CLI, custom)
route tasks to appropriate models or tools
provide shared semantic context across repositories and projects
track costs and audit agent work
execute code generation, testing, and review workflows
integrate with JetBrains IDEs, third-party IDEs, CLI, web interfaces
pricing: TBD - expected Q2 2026 (Early Access Program starting)
notes: Announced March 24, 2026. Early Access Program launching Q2 2026. Designed for coordinating work between humans and AI agents. Includes JetBrains Air (workspace for organizing tasks) and upcoming Air Team (team coordination). Non-monolithic, layered architecture with semantic layer aggregating info from code, architecture, runtime behavior, and organizational knowledge.
